headlines.title: House Republicans cancel vote curbing Trump on Iran
headlines.description: House Republicans delayed a vote on a war powers resolution that would restrict President Donald Trump’s ability to continue U.S. military operations in Iran.

headlines.title: ‘A complete and total failure’: Calls grow for DNC chair Ken Martin to resign over 2024 autopsy
headlines.description: Ashley Etienne, Dan Merica and Sarah Chamberlain join the Meet the Press NOW roundtable as Democratic National Committee chair Ken Martin faces backlash after releasing the report on former Vice President Harris’ 2024 election loss. NBC News’ Natasha Korecki explains how the long-awaited report came after intense pressure from Democrats.

headlines.title: Watch highlights from Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' finale
headlines.description: Watch highlights of the star-studded sendoff as Stephen Colbert brings the curtain down on 33 years of “The Late Show,” with legends like Jon Stewart, Paul McCartney, Bryan Cranston, and many surprises.

headlines.title: Police urge witnesses come forward in Prince Andrew investigation
headlines.description: British police urged witnesses to come forward on Friday as they continued to investigate potential offenses by former Prince Andrew related to Jeffrey Epstein.

headlines.title: Nation’s largest public pension fund plagued by secrecy and underperformance, probe finds
headlines.description: An independent investigation into the nation’s largest public pension, the California Public Employees’ Retirement System, has been completed.

headlines.title: Trump faces GOP resistance on compensation fund, ballroom money
headlines.description: GOP senators abandoned a planned vote on a proposed $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund that would compensate Trump allies who say they were unfairly prosecuted by the Biden administration. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: NASCAR star Kyle Busch dead at age 41
headlines.description: He was among the most winning drivers in NASCAR history and now the sudden death of Kyle Busch has left the racing world stunned. NBC News’ Sam Brock reports on what both NASCAR and Busch’s family have revealed about his death.

headlines.title: GLP-1 drugs may reduce the risk of cancer progressing, study suggests
headlines.description: GLP-1 drugs may be linked to a lower risk of cancer progression, according to new research that will be presented next week at the American Society of Clinical Oncology’s annual meeting.

headlines.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping
headlines.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, Supergoop and Apple.

headlines.title: SpaceX launches prototype of Starship rocket in crucial test flight
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as SpaceX launches the twelfth test flight of Starship. The company claims the third-generation prototype, dubbed V3, is larger, more powerful and a step closer to being fully reusable. The rocket is scheduled to liftoff from SpaceX's StarBase in Brownsville, Texas.

headlines.title: Police urge witnesses come forward in Prince Andrew investigation
headlines.description: British police urged witnesses to come forward on Friday as they continued to investigate potential offenses by former Prince Andrew related to Jeffrey Epstein.

headlines.title: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive
headlines.description: A 12th hantavirus case has been confirmed after a crew member aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship, which arrived in the Netherlands last week for disinfection, tested positive, the World Health Organization said Friday.
